## 📋 Today's Overview
*June 09, 2026*

### Superconductivity (10 new today)

1. The study focuses on **4Hb-Ta(S$_{1-x}$Se$_x$)$_2$**, employing **Se/S substitution to introduce quenched disorder** to address/solve **the role of disorder in driving bulk superconductivity in a system where clean samples are not bulk superconductors**.
2. The study focuses on **superconducting qubits**, employing **three infrared (IR) shielding configurations** to address/solve **quasiparticle poisoning and its suppression to $10^{-11}$ levels for improved coherence**.
3. The study focuses on **bilayer nickelates**, employing **a model with coexisting dx2-y2 conduction bands and localized d3z2-r2 spins** to address/solve **the mechanism of triplon-mediated pairing and the resulting superconducting gap structure**.
4. The study focuses on **the kagome-lattice superconductor Re$_2$Zr**, employing **first-principles investigation of electronic structure and electron-phonon coupling** to address/solve **whether its superconductivity can be explained by conventional phonon-mediated pairing**.
5. The study focuses on **superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs)**, employing **a cryogenic InGaAs-InP photodiode as a local bias source** to address/solve **improving optical biasing for low-noise and low-jitter operation**.
6. The study focuses on **superconducting circuits**, employing **airbridges as a replacement for bandages** to address/solve **the problem of unwanted wirebonds and improved contacting of Josephson junctions**.
7. The study focuses on **cuprates**, employing **the Bethe-Salpeter method** to address/solve **the quasiparticle mass enhancement and superconductivity near a charge-density-wave (CDW) critical point**.
8. The study focuses on **three-dimensional superconducting altermagnets**, employing **analysis of d- and g-wave altermagnets with chiral d-wave superconductivity** to address/solve **the formation of crossed surface flat bands from the interplay of superconducting and altermagnetic symmetries**.
9. The study focuses on **the electron-hole gas**, employing **a simple two-parameter model (density r_s and mass ratio M/m)** to address/solve **charge density waves and enhanced superconductivity in a neutral degenerate plasma**.
10. The study focuses on **a superconducting surface-code processor**, employing **lattice-surgery operations between distance-three logical qubits** to address/solve **the experimental realization of fault-tolerant logical operations for scalable quantum computation**.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on the three-dimensional spin glass, employing large-scale Monte Carlo simulations on lattices up to L=18 to address the nature and extrapolation of low-energy excitations down to zero temperature.

| 1 | **[Bulk Superconductivity driven by Disorder-Induced Delocalization in 4Hb-Ta(S$_{1-x}$Se$_x$)$_2$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07509v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unconventional superconductor 4Hb-TaS$_2$ is a natural heterostructure that can be broadly understood as interleaving Mott-like and metallic layers. We study the properties of this material as a function of quenched disorder in the form of Se/S substitution and find that while disordered samples show bulk superconductivity, clean samples do not. We show that a disorder-driven delocalization of carriers in the Mott-like ($1T$-) layer forms a new Fermi surface that is absent in the cleanest samples. This suggests that one of the primary drivers for superconductivity is the fragility of the Mott state, whose delocalization brings to life a sea of strongly correlated electrons.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非常规超导体4Hb-TaS₂是一种天然异质结构，可大致理解为莫特绝缘层与金属层交替堆叠。我们研究了以Se/S替代形式引入的淬灭无序对该材料性质的影响，发现无序样品呈现体超导电性，而洁净样品则不然。研究表明，无序驱动的载流子在类莫特（1T-）层中的退定域化形成了一个在洁净样品中不存在的全新费米面。这表明超导电性的主要驱动因素之一是莫特态的脆弱性，其退定域化催生了一个强关联电子海洋。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Lu Chen et al. |
| 2 | **[Suppression of Quasiparticle Poisoning to $10^{-11}$ Levels in Superconducting Qubits via Infrared Shielding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07339v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quasiparticle poisoning bottlenecks superconducting qubits, limiting coherence and the scalability of quantum processors. In this work, we systematically investigate quasiparticle poisoning in superconducting qubits under three infrared (IR) shielding configurations, ranging from a dedicated multi-layer design to a simplified implementation. By measuring quasiparticle-induced parity switching, we demonstrate a suppression of the switching rate by over four orders of magnitude via the implementation of improved shielding. In the best configuration, the rate decreases over time following cooldown and reaches 0.069$\,$Hz on day 34, corresponding to an anticipated quasiparticle density per Cooper pair of $1.88\times10^{-11}$. To our knowledge, this represents the lowest quasiparticle density reported in the literature to date. The remaining quasiparticle population is likely dominated by sporadic phonon bursts stemming from mechanical stress release in the on-chip films, as well as from the surrounding environment. The effective qubit temperature follows the phonon bath down to 17$\,$mK, enabling initialization errors of $\sim 0.01\%$ for 3$\,$GHz qubits. These results demonstrate that proper IR shielding and thermalization are essential for suppressing quasiparticle poisoning and enabling high-coherence, scalable superconducting qubit systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>准粒子中毒限制了超导量子比特的相干性及量子处理器的可扩展性。本工作中，我们系统研究了三种红外屏蔽配置（从专用多层设计到简化实现）下超导量子比特中的准粒子中毒现象。通过测量准粒子诱导的宇称翻转，我们证明改进屏蔽可将翻转率抑制超过四个数量级。在最优配置中，翻转率随冷却后时间推移而降低，第34天达到0.069赫兹，对应的每库珀对预期准粒子密度为1.88×10⁻¹¹。据我们所知，这是文献报道至今的最低准粒子密度。剩余准粒子群体主要源于芯片薄膜及周围环境中机械应力释放引发的间歇性声子爆发。有效量子比特温度随声子浴降至17毫开尔文，使3吉赫兹量子比特的初始化误差达到约0.01%。这些结果表明，适当的红外屏蔽与热化对抑制准粒子中毒、实现高相干可扩展超导量子比特系统至关重要。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Wei-En Lin et al. |
| 3 | **[Triplon-mediated pairing and the superconducting gap structure in bilayer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23989v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the superconducting gap structure in bilayer nickelates within a model in which conduction bands of dx2-y2 symmetry coexist with localized d3z2-r2 spins. Strong interlayer coupling drives the local moments into a singlet ground state, whose virtual singlet-triplet excitations ("triplons") mediate the pairing interaction. This mechanism yields interband s+- pairing, with opposite signs of the order parameter on the two (alpha and beta) bands. The calculated tunneling spectra naturally explain the key experimental features, including a larger gap on the alpha band despite its smaller density of states and a gap anisotropy induced by nonlocal Kondo coupling. The results support triplon-mediated pairing as the microscopic origin of superconductivity in bilayer nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在传导带具有d_{x²-y²}对称性且与局域d_{3z²-r²}自旋共存的模型中，研究了双层镍酸盐的超导能隙结构。强层间耦合将局域矩驱动为单重态基态，其虚单重态-三重态激发（"triplons"）介导了配对相互作用。该机制产生带间s±配对，两个（α和β）能带上的序参量符号相反。计算的隧穿谱自然解释了关键实验特征，包括α带尽管态密度较小却具有更大能隙，以及非局域近藤耦合诱导的能隙各向异性。这些结果支持triplon介导配对作为双层镍酸盐超导电性的微观起源。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Huimei Liu et al. |
| 4 | **[Multiband superconductivity in the kagome-lattice superconductor Re2Zr](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07184v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a first-principles investigation of the electronic structure, lattice dynamics, electron-phonon coupling, and superconducting properties of the hexagonal kagome-lattice compound Re$_2$Zr, in which time-reversal symmetry breaking and unconventional pairing have recently been proposed. We examine whether superconductivity in Re$_2$Zr can be explained within a conventional phonon-mediated framework by performing fully ab initio calculations within the density functional theory for superconductors. The electronic structure is characterized by a mixture of seven two- and three-dimensional Fermi surface sheets, giving rise to multiband superconductivity with many overlapping superconducting gaps. A spin-orbit-induced van Hove singularity is identified in the density of states near $E_F$. The electron-phonon interaction is moderately strong, with a coupling constant $λ\simeq 0.88$. Superconducting gap calculations reveal significant anisotropy and a broad distribution of gap values across different Fermi surface sheets. Spin fluctuations introduce additional depairing effects and reduce the critical temperature from 7.7 K to 6.4 K, in excellent agreement with the experimental value of 6.65 K. Taken together, our results show that the superconducting energy scale in Re$_2$Zr can be quantitatively reproduced within a conventional phonon-mediated framework, while the resulting state exhibits pronounced multiband and anisotropic gap structure. The origin of the experimentally suggested time-reversal symmetry breaking, however, remains an open question.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们首次原理计算研究了六方笼目晶格化合物Re₂Zr的电子结构、晶格动力学、电声子耦合及超导性质——该材料近期被提出存在时间反演对称性破缺与非常规配对。通过完全基于超导体密度泛函理论的从头计算，我们检验了Re₂Zr的超导电性是否可在常规声子介导框架内解释。电子结构特征为七个二维与三维费米面片的混合，产生具有多个重叠超导能隙的多带超导电性。在费米能级附近的态密度中识别出自旋轨道诱导的范霍夫奇点。电声子相互作用中等强度，耦合常数λ≈0.88。超导能隙计算揭示显著各向异性及不同费米面片间能隙值的宽分布。自旋涨落引入额外退配对效应，将临界温度从7.7开尔文降至6.4开尔文，与实验值6.65开尔文高度吻合。综合而言，我们的结果表明Re₂Zr的超导能标可在常规声子介导框架内定量重现，但所得态呈现显著多带与各向异性能隙结构。实验提示的时间反演对称性破缺的起源仍为开放问题。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Gabriel Kuderowicz et al. |
| 5 | **[Improved Cryogenic Photodiode Optical Biasing for Low-Noise and Low-Jitter Superconducting Nanowire Single-Photon Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07140v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We experimentally demonstrate an improved optical biasing scheme for superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs), which employs a cryogenic InGaAs-InP photodiode (PD) as a local bias source. It is found that, under illumination from a stable external light source, this PD generates a stable photocurrent in a cryogenic environment (~2.3 K), with fluctuations in the photocurrent primarily attributed to fluctuations in the incident optical power. Furthermore, by screening and effectively blocking stray photons leaking from the PD, which give rise to background dark counts, we have achieved an SNSPD exhibiting an ultra-low intrinsic dark count rate of 1e-4 cps. Utilizing this improved optical biasing technique, our SNSPD achieved performance comparable to that obtained under conventional electrical biasing: a system detection efficiency of 80.7%, a background dark count rate of 32.6 cps, and a minimum timing jitter of 57.5 ps. These results indicate that cryogenic-PD-based optical biasing serves as a viable, low-noise, and low-jitter alternative to traditional electrical biasing. Moreover, this work offers useful design guidance for the future development of PD-based low-noise bias sources and for the construction of all-photonic SNSPD systems tailored for high-precision quantum photonics applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们实验展示了一种用于超导纳米线单光子探测器（SNSPD）的改进型光学偏置方案，该方案采用低温InGaAs-InP光电二极管作为本地偏置源。研究发现，在稳定外部光源照射下，该光电二极管在低温环境（约2.3开尔文）中产生稳定光电流，光电流波动主要归因于入射光功率的波动。此外，通过屏蔽并有效阻挡从光电二极管泄漏的杂散光子（这些光子会引发背景暗计数），我们实现了具有超低本征暗计数率（1e-4 cps）的SNSPD。利用此改进光学偏置技术，我们的SNSPD达到了与传统电学偏置相当的性能：系统探测效率80.7%，背景暗计数率32.6 cps，最小时间抖动57.5皮秒。这些结果表明基于低温光电二极管的光学偏置可作为传统电学偏置的可行、低噪声、低抖动替代方案。此外，本工作为未来开发基于光电二极管的低噪声偏置源以及构建适用于高精度量子光子学应用的全光子SNSPD系统提供了有益的设计指导。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Jia-Hao Hu et al. |
| 6 | **[Contacting Josephson Junctions via Airbridges in Superconducting Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06951v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting circuit devices require electrical interconnects between different circuit elements on the chip, for which conventional device architectures use a combination of two structural elements: \textit{airbridges} to connect non-adjacent elements in the base layer, and \textit{bandages} to connect the electrodes forming the Josephson junctions to the base layer. Bandages introduce unwanted parasitic material interfaces and increase the manufacturing complexity. Here, we overcome the limitations imposed by \emph{bandages} by establishing \textit{all} electrical interconnects with airbridges of varying size fabricated in a single step. The airbridges show a high yield and mechanical stability over a wide range of sizes from $0.5\,μ\mathrm{m}$ to $4\,μ\mathrm{m}$ in width and from $5\,μ\mathrm{m}$ to $40\,μ\mathrm{m}$ in length, and show low loss when integrated in coplanar waveguide resonators and transmon qubits. Measured relaxation times up to more than $250\,μ\mathrm{s}$ in standard transmon geometries show that the process achieves high coherence while substantially easing and accelerating device fabrication.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导电路器件需要芯片上不同电路元件之间的电互连，传统器件架构使用两种结构元件的组合：用于连接基层中非相邻元件的“空气桥”，以及用于将形成约瑟夫森结的电极连接到基层的“绑带”。绑带会引入不必要的寄生材料界面并增加制造复杂性。在此，我们通过建立一种单步制造工艺、利用不同尺寸的空气桥实现全部电互连，从而克服了绑带带来的限制。这些空气桥在宽度0.5微米至4微米、长度5微米至40微米的广泛尺寸范围内展现出高成品率和机械稳定性，并在集成到共面波导谐振器和transmon量子比特中时表现出低损耗。在标准transmon几何结构中测得的弛豫时间超过250微秒，表明该工艺在实现高相干性的同时，显著简化并加速了器件制造。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Prakiran Baidya et al. |
| 7 | **[Superconductivity and the quasiparticle mass enhancement near the CDW critical point using Bethe-Salpeter method: Application to cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19536v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In recent years, charge-channel order in strongly correlated metals has attracted much attention. Representative examples include electronic nematic order in cuprates and iron-based superconductors, and Star-of-David order in kagome metals. Critical phenomena and unconventional superconductivity arising from fluctuations of such charge-channel orders are central issues today; however, the essential role is played by many-body effects (vertex corrections) beyond the mean-field approximation, and their origin and computational methods have not been established. In this study, we propose the Bethe-Salpeter equation method to evaluate electron-electron interactions in two-dimensional Hubbard models beyond the mean-field approximation. Based on the Baym-Kadanoff conserving approximation, we find that an attractive interaction in the charge channel emerges from the Aslamazov-Larkin vertex corrections that describe the interference processes among spin fluctuations. Applying this method to the square-lattice Hubbard model shows that the cooperation of attractive charge fluctuations and repulsive spin fluctuations yields high-$T_c$ $d$-wave superconductivity together with enhanced effective mass. These results provide a natural explanation for the phase diagram of cuprate superconductors, in which $d$-wave superconductivity is strongly enhanced near the charge-order critical point.The theory can also be applied to iron-based and nickelate superconductors, suggesting broad potential for future applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近年来，强关联金属中的电荷通道序引起了广泛关注。典型例子包括铜氧化物和铁基超导体中的电子向列序，以及笼目金属中的大卫之星序。由这类电荷通道序的涨落引发的临界现象和非传统超导电性是当前的核心问题；然而，超越平均场近似的多体效应（顶点修正）发挥着关键作用，但其起源和计算方法尚未明确。在本研究中，我们提出了Bethe-Salpeter方程方法，用于在超越平均场近似的框架下评估二维Hubbard模型中的电子-电子相互作用。基于Baym-Kadanoff守恒近似，我们发现电荷通道中的吸引相互作用源于描述自旋涨落间干涉过程的Aslamazov-Larkin顶点修正。将该方法应用于方格Hubbard模型表明，吸引性电荷涨落与排斥性自旋涨落的协同作用产生了高温d波超导电性，同时有效质量得到增强。这些结果为铜氧化物超导体的相图提供了自然解释——在电荷序临界点附近d波超导电性被强烈增强。该理论也可应用于铁基和镍酸盐超导体，展现出未来应用的广泛潜力。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Youichi Yamakawa et al. |
| 8 | **[Crossed surface flat bands in three-dimensional superconducting altermagnets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.14724v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting altermagnets have proven to be a promising ground for emergent phenomena, but their study has involved two-dimensional systems. In this work, we investigate three-dimensional $d$- and $g$-wave altermagnets with spin-singlet chiral $d$-wave superconductivity and show the formation of crossed surface flat bands due to the interplay between superconducting and altermagnetic symmetries. We find that these crossed flat bands are topologically protected, appear at zero energy in the surface along $z$ due to the superconducting nodal lines in the $xy$-plane, and their number of corners is determined by the crystal symmetry of altermagnets. We also show that the superconducting nodal lines give rise to Bogoliubov-Fermi surfaces, which then affect the appearance of zero-energy arcs in the surface along $x$. Moreover, we demonstrate that the crossed flat bands or surface arcs, and Bogoliubov-Fermi surfaces give rise to the coexistence of three distinct dependences of the charge conductance on the normal transparency, hence offering a solid way for their detection and paving the way for realizing higher-dimensional topological phases using altermagnets.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导交变磁体已被证明是涌现现象的理想平台，但相关研究此前仅限于二维系统。在本工作中，我们研究了具有自旋单态手性d波超导电性的三维d波和g波交变磁体，并展示了由于超导与交变磁对称性之间的相互作用而形成的交叉表面平带。我们发现这些交叉平带受到拓扑保护，由于xy平面内的超导节线而在沿z方向的表面上出现在零能量处，其角点数由交变磁体的晶体对称性决定。我们还表明，超导节线会产生Bogoliubov-Fermi表面，进而影响沿x方向表面上零能量弧的出现。此外，我们证明了交叉平带或表面弧以及Bogoliubov-Fermi表面会导致电荷电导对正常透明度的三种不同依赖关系共存，从而为它们的探测提供了可靠途径，并为利用交变磁体实现更高维拓扑相铺平了道路。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Yuri Fukaya et al. |
| 9 | **[Charge density waves and enhanced superconductivity in the electron-hole gas: a plausible, simple, physically intuitive model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06649v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A neutral degenerate plasma of equal numbers of electrons and positively charged fermions (holes) -- the electron-hole gas -- is studied using a simple, physically motivated two-parameter model (density r_s and mass ratio M/m). Two simplifying assumptions are made but not proven: the electron-hole correlation energy is approximately independent of density and does not affect the pressure or bulk modulus, and the electron-hole contribution to the local field factors is zero, allowing use of the known electron-gas local field factors. With these assumptions the phase diagram, instabilities, and effective interactions can be calculated for all mass ratios and densities using simple formulae, reproducible on a laptop. The key new physics is the additional screening provided by the mobile holes. A single function Delta appears in the denominator of all effective interactions and response functions. Near the zeros of Delta at q = 0 (compressibility instability) and at finite q, three phenomena are simultaneously enhanced: charge density waves (for M/m >= 4.97), a large T^2 electrical resistivity from electron-hole scattering, and an attractive electron-electron interaction that is the purely electronic analog of BCS electron-phonon coupling. Crudely estimated superconducting transition temperatures approach room temperature, reaching approximately 275 K at M/m = 9. No claim is made that this model applies to any specific material. The aim is to provoke scrutiny of the assumptions, calculation of the unknown local field factors, and investigation of whether this minimal two-carrier framework maps onto real systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们采用一个简单、具有物理动机的双参数模型（密度r_s和质量比M/m），研究了电子和正电荷费米子（空穴）数量相等的中性简并等离子体——电子-空穴气体。我们做了两个简化假设但未加以证明：电子-空穴关联能近似与密度无关且不影响压力或体模量；电子-空穴对局域场因子的贡献为零，从而允许使用已知的电子气局域场因子。基于这些假设，可以利用简单公式计算所有质量比和密度下的相图、不稳定性和有效相互作用，且可在笔记本电脑上复现。关键的物理新内容是移动空穴提供的额外屏蔽。单个函数Δ出现在所有有效相互作用和响应函数的分母中。在Δ于q=0（压缩率不稳定性）和有限q处为零点附近，三种现象同时增强：电荷密度波（当M/m ≥ 4.97时）、由电子-空穴散射产生的大T^2电阻率，以及作为BCS电子-声子耦合纯电子类似物的吸引性电子-电子相互作用。粗略估计的超导转变温度接近室温，在M/m=9时达到约275K。我们并不声称该模型适用于任何特定材料。目的是引发对假设的审视、对未知局域场因子的计算，以及探究这一最小双载流子框架是否映射到真实系统。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Carl A Kukkonen et al. |
| 10 | **[A superconducting surface-code processor with lattice-surgery logical operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06598v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Fault-tolerant logical operations are fundamental for scalable quantum computation. Here, we report the experimental realization of lattice-surgery operations between a pair of distance-three surface-code logical qubits on a planar superconducting processor. During repeated syndrome extraction cycles, the logical qubits exhibit per-cycle error rates of $0.0365(2)$ and $0.0282(1)$, respectively, after leakage events are rejected. By leveraging joint initialization and lattice splitting, we deterministically prepare a logical Bell state, confirming genuine bipartite entanglement via the error-corrected logical state fidelity. We further execute a two-qubit Deutsch-Jozsa algorithm at the logical level to demonstrate algorithmic utility in a fault-tolerant framework. Finally, to achieve universal control, we implement magic-state injection and gate teleportation to realize continuous non-Clifford rotations about the logical $X$ axis. For the logical $R_{X}(π/4)$ gate, we achieve a logical gate fidelity of $0.943_{-9}^{+10}$ conditioned on the absence of detected errors. These results establish lattice surgery as a practical and versatile paradigm for logical computation in near-term surface-code architectures, representing a critical milestone toward scalable fault-tolerant quantum advantage in superconducting circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>容错逻辑操作是可扩展量子计算的基础。在此，我们报告了在平面超导处理器上，一对距离为三的表面码逻辑量子比特之间晶格手术操作的实验实现。在重复的综合征提取周期中，在排除泄漏事件后，逻辑量子比特的每周期错误率分别为0.0365(2)和0.0282(1)。通过利用联合初始化和晶格分裂，我们确定性地制备了一个逻辑贝尔态，并通过纠错后的逻辑态保真度确认了真正的二分纠缠。我们进一步在逻辑层面执行了双量子比特Deutsch-Jozsa算法，以展示其在容错框架中的算法实用性。最后，为实现通用控制，我们实现了魔法态注入和门隐形传态，以实现绕逻辑X轴的连续非Clifford旋转。对于逻辑R_X(π/4)门，我们在未检测到错误的条件下实现了0.943_{-9}^{+10}的逻辑门保真度。这些结果确立了晶格手术作为近期表面码架构中实用且通用的逻辑计算范式，代表了在超导电路中迈向可扩展容错量子优势的关键里程碑。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Yanzhe Wang et al. |
| 11 | **[Superconducting triode effect in a quantum-dot Josephson junction with a biased top gate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06465v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Non-reciprocal supercurrents enable non-dissipative rectification, holding great promise for superconducting electronics. Conventionally, this non-reciprocity, termed the superconducting diode effect, requires the simultaneous breaking of time-reversal and parity symmetries. Here, we propose a superconducting triode effect in an asymmetric quantum-dot Josephson junction coupled to an additional metallic top gate, which breaks the parity symmetry while explicitly preserving time-reversal symmetry. We demonstrate that the supercurrent across this junction exhibits a strong non-reciprocal effect that can be continuously manipulated via the top gate to achieve an ideal unidirectional supercurrent, thus manifesting a superconducting triode effect. Furthermore, under radio-frequency radiation, this junction exhibits highly asymmetric Shapiro steps, realizing fully quantized supercurrent rectification. Our work not only provides an alternative physical mechanism for the superconducting diode effect observed in Josephson junctions with explicit time-reversal symmetry, but also introduces a new tuning knob to manipulate supercurrent non-reciprocity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非互易超电流能够实现无耗散整流，为超导电子学带来了巨大前景。传统上，这种被称为超导二极管效应的非互易性需要同时打破时间反演对称性和宇称对称性。在此，我们提出了一种在非对称量子点约瑟夫森结中实现的超导三极管效应，该结与一个额外的金属顶栅耦合，顶栅打破了宇称对称性，同时明确地保持了时间反演对称性。我们证明，穿过该结的超电流表现出强烈的非互易效应，可以通过顶栅连续调控，从而实现理想的单向超电流，这体现了超导三极管效应。此外，在射频辐射下，该结表现出高度不对称的夏皮罗台阶，实现了完全量子化的超电流整流。我们的工作不仅为在具有明确时间反演对称性的约瑟夫森结中观察到的超导二极管效应提供了一种替代的物理机制，而且还引入了一个新的调控旋钮来操纵超电流的非互易性。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Yu-Hang Li et al. |
| 12 | **[Reentrant Superconductivity from Competing Spin-Triplet Instabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.23954v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reentrant superconductivity in strong magnetic fields challenges the conventional expectation that magnetic fields necessarily suppress superconductivity. We show that reentrant superconducting instability can arise from the competition between spin-unpolarized and spin-polarized superconducting channels. Using a minimal Ginzburg--Landau theory with two coupled spin-triplet order parameters, we demonstrate that a magnetic field can reorganize the hierarchy of superconducting instabilities, yielding a characteristic reentrant instability curve over a broad parameter range.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>强磁场中的重返超导现象挑战了磁场必然抑制超导的传统预期。我们证明，重返超导不稳定性可能源于自旋非极化与自旋极化超导通道之间的竞争。利用一个包含两个耦合自旋三重态序参量的最小金茨堡-朗道理论，我们证明磁场可以重组超导不稳定性的层级结构，从而在一个广泛的参数范围内产生特征性的重返不稳定性曲线。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Jun Goryo et al. |
| 13 | **[2.4 GHz Flip-flop Device within Nonequilibrium Superconducting Diode](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06152v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting diode effect exhibits asymmetric critical supercurrent and has profound implications for condensed matter physics. The technical appeals of such superconducting diodes are their ultrahigh on-off ratio and diode efficiency for superconducting electronics owing to the dissipationless supercurrent therein. However, realizing superconducting diode operation at high working frequency, which is a key requirement for practical applications, remains elusive and challenging. Here, we demonstrate a polarity-controllable superconducting diode with non-equilibrium Josephson junction and its edge-triggered flip-flop operation at a high frequency up to 2.4 GHz, within a van der Waals superconductor 2M-WS$_2$. By simply tuning the thickness of superconducting 2M-WS$_2$ nanoflakes to engineer inversion asymmetry in the junction, we achieve a high diode efficiency of 67% and an on-off ratio exceeding 10$^5$. Importantly, the pulse width and duty cycle of output pulse signals in such superconducting diode flip-flop devices can be controlled in a broadband frequency range crossing 12 orders of magnitude. Theoretical analysis reveals that the non-equilibrium dynamic nature of supercurrent in these Josephson junctions enables such a high diode operating frequency and the polarity control of supercurrent. The 2.4 GHz non-equilibrium Josephson diode developed here provides a promising platform for advanced superconducting logic circuits and broadband telecommunication applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应展现出非对称的临界超电流，并对凝聚态物理具有深远意义。此类超导二极管的技术吸引力在于，由于其内部的无耗散超电流，它们具有超高的开关比和二极管效率，适用于超导电子学。然而，实现高频工作下的超导二极管操作——这是实际应用的关键要求——仍然难以实现且充满挑战。在此，我们展示了一种具有非平衡约瑟夫森结的极性可控超导二极管，及其在范德瓦尔斯超导体2M-WS₂中高达2.4 GHz频率下的边沿触发触发器操作。通过简单地调控超导2M-WS₂纳米片的厚度来设计结中的反演不对称性，我们实现了67%的高二极管效率和超过10⁵的开关比。重要的是，在这种超导二极管触发器器件中，输出脉冲信号的脉冲宽度和占空比可以在跨越12个数量级的宽带频率范围内进行控制。理论分析揭示，这些约瑟夫森结中超电流的非平衡动态特性使得如此高的二极管工作频率和超电流的极性控制成为可能。这里开发的2.4 GHz非平衡约瑟夫森二极管为先进的超导逻辑电路和宽带电信应用提供了一个有前景的平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Xiangyu Bi et al. |
| 14 | **[Superconductivity beyond band geometry: emergence of pair quantum geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06017v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum geometry shapes the effective mass of Bloch particles through the geometric properties of single-particle states. Here we show that this principle extends to paired states. Starting from a generic multiband Hubbard model, we derive an exact effective-mass theorem for two-body bound states and its many-body counterpart for Cooper pairs near the critical temperature within Gaussian fluctuation theory. In both cases, the inverse effective mass separates into a ``conventional'' band-structure contribution and a new geometric contribution, pair quantum geometry, governed by quantum metrics on the pairing manifold, which becomes nontrivial when pairing is non-uniform across sublattices. In the many-body setting, analytic continuation renders the fluctuation kernel non-Hermitian, producing a biorthogonal pair geometry and a generally complex Cooper-pair effective mass whose imaginary part reflects Landau damping. Exact calculations on one-, two-, and three-dimensional lattice models show that pair quantum geometry can make quantitatively significant contributions to the effective mass. These results establish pair quantum geometry as a fundamental ingredient of superconductivity beyond conventional band geometry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子几何通过单粒子态的几何性质来塑造布洛赫粒子的有效质量。在此我们证明，这一原理可推广到配对态。从一个通用的多能带哈伯德模型出发，我们推导出了双粒子束缚态的精确有效质量定理，以及在高斯涨落理论框架下，临界温度附近库珀对的多体对应定理。在这两种情况下，逆有效质量都分解为“常规”的能带结构贡献和一个新的几何贡献——配对量子几何，后者由配对流形上的量子度量决定，当配对在子晶格间非均匀时，该贡献变得非平凡。在多体情形下，解析延拓使得涨落核变为非厄米的，从而产生双正交配对几何和一个通常为复数的库珀对有效质量，其虚部反映了朗道阻尼。在一维、二维和三维晶格模型上的精确计算表明，配对量子几何可以对有效质量做出数量级上显著的贡献。这些结果确立了配对量子几何作为超越常规能带几何的超导基本要素。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Mehmet Akif Keskiner et al. |
| 15 | **[Superconductivity from the Slater mode: Application to KTaO3 heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.10903v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity has been observed for the 2D electron gas (2DEG) at the interface of KTaO3 with other oxides, with a transition temperature about an order of magnitude higher than its 3d cousin SrTiO3. The superconducting transition temperature is strongly dependent on the orientation of the interface. Motivated by this observation, we study pairing due to exchange of the soft transverse optic phonon mode characteristic of quantum paraelectrics and use the resulting theory to comment on the nature of superconductivity of this 2DEG. We find (1) an orientation dependence consistent with experiment along with an anisotropic gap function, but (2) a BCS coupling constant that is smaller than needed and so must be augmented by contributions from other phonons to be consistent with the observed values of Tc.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在KTaO₃与其他氧化物的界面处的二维电子气中已观测到超导现象，其转变温度比其三维同类材料SrTiO₃高出约一个数量级。超导转变温度强烈依赖于界面的取向。受此观察启发，我们研究了由量子顺电体特有的软横向光学声子模式交换引起的配对，并利用所得理论来评述该二维电子气超导的性质。我们发现：(1) 与实验一致的取向依赖性以及各向异性的能隙函数，但 (2) 其BCS耦合常数小于所需值，因此必须通过来自其他声子的贡献来增强，才能与观测到的Tc值相符。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | M. R. Norman et al. |
| 16 | **[Magnetochiral anisotropy in strained superconducting transition metal dichalcogenides](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05302v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a theoretical study of nonreciprocal charge transport in two-dimensional noncentrosymmetric superconductors, focusing on transition-metal dichalcogenide MoS$_2$ as a representative example. In the normal state, the electrical response of a material to the relative orientation of the current and magnetic field is suppressed to leading order in the symmetry-breaking perturbations. In the vicinity of the superconducting transition, magnetochiral anisotropy is strongly enhanced. We consider contributions to the nonreciprocal current originating from order-parameter fluctuations and quantum-interference processes. These terms are linked to higher-order Lifshitz invariants generically allowed in the Ginzburg-Landau free energy of superconductors with broken inversion and time-reversal symmetries. We further show that strain enables additional vector components in the nonlinear current response.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了二维非中心对称超导体中非互易电荷输运的理论研究，以过渡金属二硫族化物MoS₂作为代表性示例。在正常态下，材料对电流与磁场相对取向的电响应在对称性破缺微扰的领头阶被抑制。在超导转变附近，磁手性各向异性显著增强。我们考虑了源于序参量涨落和量子干涉过程的非互易电流贡献。这些项与在破缺反演对称性和时间反演对称性的超导体的金兹堡-朗道自由能中普遍允许的高阶利夫希茨不变量相关联。我们进一步表明，应变能够在非线性电流响应中引入额外的矢量分量。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Joaquim Telles de Miranda et al. |
| 17 | **[Benchmarking Quantum Computers via Protocols, Comparing Superconducting and Ion-Trap Quantum Technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27397v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Both Superconducting and Ion-Trap are leading quantum architectures common in the current landscape of the quantum computing field, each with distinct characteristics and operational constraints. Understanding and measuring the underlying \underline{quantumness} of these devices is essential for assessing their readiness for practical applications and guiding future progress and research. Building on earlier work (Meirom, Mor and Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441), we utilize a benchmarking strategy applicable for comparing these two architectures by measuring "quantumness" directly on optimal sub-chips. Distinct from existing metrics, our approach employs rigorous binary fidelity thresholds derived from the classical limits of state transfer. This enables us to definitively establish quantum advantage of a designated sub-region. Here we apply this quality assurance methodology to platforms from both technologies. This comparison provides a protocol-based evaluation of quantumness advantage, revealing not only the strengths and weaknesses of each tested chip and its sub-chips but also offering a common language for their assessment. By abstracting away technical differences in the final result, we demonstrate a benchmarking strategy that bridges the gap between disparate quantum-circuit technologies, enabling fair performance comparisons and establishing a critical foundation for evaluating future claims of quantum advantage. This work was made possible by policies of two companies who enable independent and objective assessment on their quantum computers and sub-chips. In the name of science, we encourage other companies to emulate the independent qubit availability and the fair pricing which allow researchers to preform such assessments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导和离子阱都是当前量子计算领域常见的领先量子架构，各自具有不同的特性和操作约束。理解和测量这些设备底层的“量子性”，对于评估其实际应用就绪度以及指导未来进展和研究至关重要。基于前期工作（Meirom, Mor and Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441），我们采用一种基准测试策略，通过直接在最优子芯片上测量“量子性”来比较这两种架构。与现有指标不同，我们的方法采用了源自状态转移经典极限的严格二元保真度阈值。这使我们能够明确地确定指定子区域的量子优势。在此，我们将这种质量保证方法应用于来自两种技术的平台。这种比较提供了一种基于协议的量子优势评估，不仅揭示了每个被测芯片及其子芯片的优缺点，还为它们的评估提供了一种通用语言。通过在最终结果中抽象掉技术差异，我们展示了一种弥合不同量子电路技术之间差距的基准测试策略，从而能够进行公平的性能比较，并为评估未来关于量子优势的声明奠定关键基础。这项工作得益于两家公司的政策，它们允许对其量子计算机和子芯片进行独立客观的评估。以科学的名义，我们鼓励其他公司效仿，提供独立的量子比特可用性和公平定价，使研究人员能够进行此类评估。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Nitay Mayo et al. |
| 18 | **[First-Principles Calculation of Superconducting $T_c$ in Superhard B-C-N Metals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.02104v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform first-principles electron-phonon calculations to evaluate the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$ for ternary superhard metals B$_2$C$_3$N and B$_4$C$_5$N$_3$. An ambient-pressure $T_c$ of $\sim 40$ K and $\sim 20$ K is obtained respectively for B$_2$C$_3$N and B$_4$C$_5$N$_3$ from the Eliashberg gap equations. The relatively high $T_c$ of these compounds is due in part to their high Debye temperatures associated with superhardness. The materials under study are potentially synthesizable, as their formation energies are comparable to those of other recently synthesized superhard B-C-N compounds. Therefore, studying superhard metals could hold the promise of realizing new higher-$T_c$ superconductors at ambient pressure.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们进行了第一性原理电子-声子计算，以评估三元超硬金属B₂C₃N和B₄C₅N₃的超导转变温度$T_c$。根据Eliashberg间隙方程，B₂C₃N和B₄C₅N₃在常压下分别获得了约40 K和约20 K的$T_c$。这些化合物相对较高的$T_c$部分归因于其与超硬度相关的高德拜温度。所研究的材料具有潜在的可合成性，因为它们的形成能与最近合成的其他超硬B-C-N化合物相当。因此，研究超硬金属有望在常压下实现新的更高$T_c$的超导体。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Adam D. Smith et al. |
| 19 | **[Quantum secret sharing in tripartite superconducting network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13643v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microwave quantum networks is a rapidly developing field, enabling distributed quantum computing and holding a promise for hybrid architectures in quantum internet. Quantum secret sharing (QSS) is one of the key protocols for multipartite quantum networks and can provide an unconditionally secure way to share quantum states among $n$ players. Using microwave two-mode squeezed states as an entanglement resource, we experimentally implement a QSS protocol with $n = 3$, where a subset of at least $k = 2$ players must collaborate to faithfully reconstruct the original secret state. We demonstrate reconstructed-state fidelities that surpass the asymptotic no-cloning threshold of $F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$ and identify a parameter regime that allows for unconditionally secure communication in the presence of an omnipotent dishonest player. Furthermore, we experimentally explore inherent connections between QSS and other important quantum information processing tasks, such as quantum dense coding and elementary quantum error correction of channel erasures. Finally, we discuss extensions of QSS and its relation to the concept of blind quantum computing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微波量子网络是一个快速发展的领域，它能够实现分布式量子计算，并为量子互联网中的混合架构提供了前景。量子秘密共享（QSS）是多部分量子网络的关键协议之一，可以为$n$个参与者之间共享量子态提供无条件安全的方式。利用微波双模压缩态作为纠缠资源，我们实验性地实现了一个$n=3$的QSS协议，其中至少需要$k=2$个参与者的子集协作才能忠实地重建原始秘密态。我们展示了重建态保真度超过了渐近不可克隆阈值$F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$，并确定了一个参数区域，该区域允许在存在全能型不诚实参与者的情况下进行无条件安全通信。此外，我们实验性地探索了QSS与其他重要量子信息处理任务（如量子密集编码和信道擦除的基本量子纠错）之间的内在联系。最后，我们讨论了QSS的扩展及其与盲量子计算概念的关系。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | W. K. Yam et al. |
| 20 | **[Theory of frozen flux in a narrow uniform superconducting strip after cooling in a small magnetic field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.04961v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We analyze residual frozen flux in a long narrow superconducting strip cooled through its transition temperature $T_{c}$ in a small perpendicular magnetic field. This problem is relevant for the issue of trapped magnetic flux in superconducting electronic devices. During cooling, the low-temperature vortex configuration is formed at temperatures very close to $T_{c}$, where the flux density is determined by dynamic balance between the thermally-activated exits and entries of vortices over the geometrical energy barrier formed by the interaction with the strip edges and the Meissner screening current. In the field range between the minimum flux-expulsion field and the penetration field, the equilibrium flux density is finite due to thermal activation and rapidly decreases with decreasing temperature. During cooling, however, the escape rate decreases exponentially, and the vortex density falls out of equilibrium at a field-dependent freezing temperature $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$. We derive and solve the dynamic-balance equation for this process, which yields definite quantitative results for $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$ and the frozen vortex density. The relative freezing temperature $1\!-\!T_{\mathrm{fr}}/T_{c}$ exceeds the fluctuation width of the transition by a large logarithmic factor, rapidly increases when the magnetic field approaches the minimum flux-expulsion field, and logarithmically increases with decreasing cooling rate. The resulting frozen flux density has a very strong magnetic-field dependence which can be used to define the effective flux-expulsion magnetic field.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们分析了在垂直于长窄超导带的弱磁场中，将其冷却通过转变温度$T_{c}$时残留的冻结磁通。该问题与超导电子器件中捕获磁通的问题相关。在冷却过程中，低温涡旋构型在非常接近$T_{c}$的温度下形成，此时磁通密度由涡旋与带边缘相互作用及迈斯纳屏蔽电流形成的几何能垒上的热激活逃逸和进入之间的动态平衡决定。在最小磁通排出场和穿透场之间的场范围内，由于热激活，平衡磁通密度是有限的，并随温度降低而迅速减小。然而，在冷却过程中，逃逸率呈指数下降，涡旋密度在一个与场相关的冻结温度$T_{\mathrm{fr}}$处偏离平衡。我们推导并求解了该过程的动态平衡方程，得到了$T_{\mathrm{fr}}$和冻结涡旋密度的明确定量结果。相对冻结温度$1\!-\!T_{\mathrm{fr}}/T_{c}$超过转变的涨落宽度一个大的对数因子，当磁场接近最小磁通排出场时迅速增加，并随冷却速率降低而对数增加。由此产生的冻结磁通密度具有很强的磁场依赖性，可用于定义有效的磁通排出磁场。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Alexei E. Koshelev et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[On the true low-energy excitations of the three-dimensional spin glass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07197v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the low-energy excitations of the three dimensional spin glass through a large-scale Monte Carlo simulation on lattices up to $L=18$. We find smooth extrapolations down to zero temperature, which, in the case of the energy and of the link overlap, can be directly -- and favourably -- compared with previous investigations featuring ground states (i.e., at zero temperature). The best fit for the fractal dimension of the excitations is provided by Replica-Symmetry Breaking theory, but we also consider the alternative TNT description. The $P(q)$ is found to verify the Parisi-Toulouse temperature scaling. Our data provides a spectacular confirmation of the overlap-equivalence hypothesis.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们通过晶格尺寸高达 $L=18$ 的大规模蒙特卡罗模拟，研究了三维自旋玻璃的低能激发。我们发现向零温的平滑外推结果，在能量和链接重叠的情况下，能够直接且有利地与先前关注基态（即零温）的研究进行对比。激发分形维数的最佳拟合由副本对称性破缺理论提供，但我们也考虑了替代性的TNT描述。研究发现 $P(q)$ 满足Parisi-Toulouse温度标度关系。我们的数据为重叠等价假说提供了显著的证实。</p></details> | 2026-06-05 | Claudio Chilin et al. |
| 2 | **[Probing the scale-free hierarchy of the $p=3$ spherical spin glass via persistent Langevin dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02239v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>How does a persistent random walker perceive a complex energy landscape? We address this question by studying the persistent Langevin dynamics of the p=3 spherical spin glass, a paradigmatic mean-field model with a scale-free hierarchical landscape. By tuning the persistence time tau_p, which controls the walker's inertia and effectively sets its energy resolution delta E proportional to 1/tau_p, we measure the energy correlation time tau_corr. At temperature T=1.0, we find tau_corr scales as tau_p to the power alpha with alpha = 0.337 plus or minus 0.035 for tau_p in the range [2,32] (for N=64), in excellent agreement with the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) universality class prediction alpha = 1/3. Finite-size scaling using N = 16,32,48,64,128 yields the thermodynamic limit alpha(infinity) = 0.3333 plus or minus 0.0134, fully consistent with 1/3. Thus, tau_p acts as a tunable probe that reveals the predicted scale-free hierarchy of the landscape. Moreover, the temperature dependence alpha(T) for T = 0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0 exhibits a clear U-shaped curve, identifying three dynamical regimes: ballistic/inertial, KPZ, and noise-dominated. Our results establish persistent Langevin dynamics as a powerful tool for uncovering hidden landscape topology and demonstrate that the p=3 spherical spin glass belongs to the KPZ universality class.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>一个具有持久性的随机游走者如何感知复杂的能量景观？我们通过研究p=3球面自旋玻璃（一种具有无标度层次景观的典型平均场模型）的持久朗之万动力学来探讨这一问题。通过调节持久时间tau_p（它控制游走者的惯性，并有效设定其能量分辨率delta E与1/tau_p成正比），我们测量了能量相关时间tau_corr。在温度T=1.0时，我们发现对于tau_p在[2,32]范围内（N=64），tau_corr按tau_p的alpha次方标度，其中alpha = 0.337 ± 0.035，与Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ)普适类预测的alpha = 1/3高度吻合。使用N = 16,32,48,64,128的有限尺寸标度得到热力学极限alpha(∞) = 0.3333 ± 0.0134，与1/3完全一致。因此，tau_p作为一种可调探针，揭示了景观中预测的无标度层次结构。此外，温度依赖性alpha(T)在T = 0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0时呈现清晰的U形曲线，识别出三个动力学区域：弹道/惯性区、KPZ区和噪声主导区。我们的结果确立了持久朗之万动力学作为揭示隐藏景观拓扑结构的强大工具，并证明了p=3球面自旋玻璃属于KPZ普适类。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | Li Zhenpeng et al. |
| 3 | **[Ground State Excitations and Energy Fluctuations in Short-Range Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.27507v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the stability of ground states in the Edwards-Anderson Ising spin glass in dimensions two and higher against perturbations of a single coupling. After reviewing the concepts of critical droplets, flexibilities and metastates, we show that, in any dimension, a certain kind of critical droplet with space-filling (i.e., positive spatial density) boundary does not exist in ground states generated by coupling-independent boundary conditions. Using this we show that if incongruent ground states exist in any dimension, the variance of their energy difference restricted to finite volumes scales proportionally to the volume. This in turn is used to prove that a metastate generated by (e.g.) periodic boundary conditions is unique and supported on a single pair of spin-reversed ground states in two dimensions. We further show that any excitation above an infinite-volume ground state with a positive-density interface must have the property that its energy difference with the ground state in a restricted volume diverges as the square root of the restricted volume.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了二维及更高维Edwards-Anderson伊辛自旋玻璃中基态对单一耦合扰动的稳定性。在回顾临界滴、柔性和亚稳态的概念后，我们证明，在任何维度中，由耦合无关边界条件生成的基态中不存在具有空间填充（即正空间密度）边界的某种临界滴。利用这一点，我们证明如果在任何维度中存在不一致的基态，则它们在有限体积内能量差值的方差与体积成比例标度。这进而被用来证明由（例如）周期边界条件生成的亚稳态是唯一的，并且在二维中支撑在一对自旋反转的基态上。我们进一步证明，任何具有正密度界面的无限体积基态之上的激发，必须具有这样的性质：其在受限体积内与基态的能量差值随受限体积的平方根发散。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | C. M. Newman et al. |
| 4 | **[Cosm: Collective Switched Motion for Fast and Accurate Sparse Ising Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30355v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce Collective Switched Motion (Cosm), a dynamical system-based heuristic algorithm. Cosm combines locally interacting continuous circular variables with novel global coordination rules that facilitate collective dynamics. Pairwise interactions occur sequentially over a set of conflict-free edge partitions, resulting in an interaction network that switches periodically. Unlike conventional gradient-based approaches, Cosm employs structured, non-smooth switching dynamics with finite-magnitude interactions that sustain collective fluctuations and promote exploration beyond local minima. A correlated perturbation mechanism further promotes coordinated cluster motion in the circular phase space. On the three largest Ising problems from the Gset suite, which have 10,000-20,000 variables and represent 2D spin glasses, Cosm attains the optimal solutions (verified with an exact solver) heuristically for the first time. On two large bounded-degree non-lattice graph instances, Cosm reduces the state-of-the-art times-to-target from hundreds of hours to 36-303 s. Results on benchmark problems with tuned hardness suggest favorable scaling relative to previously characterized dynamical solvers. These results suggest that Cosm's synthesis of local interactions, structured switching dynamics, and global coordination provides an effective computational framework for sparse optimization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入集体切换运动（Cosm），一种基于动力系统的启发式算法。Cosm将局部相互作用的连续圆形变量与促进集体动力学的新型全局协调规则相结合。成对相互作用在一组无冲突边划分上顺序发生，产生一个周期性切换的交互网络。与传统的基于梯度的方法不同，Cosm采用结构化的、非光滑的切换动力学，具有有限幅度的相互作用，维持集体涨落并促进超越局部极小值的探索。一种相关扰动机制进一步促进了圆形相空间中的协调簇运动。在Gset套件中三个最大的伊辛问题上（具有10,000-20,000个变量，代表二维自旋玻璃），Cosm首次启发式地达到了最优解（经精确求解器验证）。在两个大型有界度非晶格图实例上，Cosm将最先进的求解时间从数百小时缩短至36-303秒。在具有调谐硬度的基准问题上的结果表明，相对于先前表征的动力学求解器，其具有有利的标度性。这些结果表明，Cosm对局部交互、结构化切换动力学和全局协调的综合，为稀疏优化提供了一个有效的计算框架。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | Kenneth M. Zick et al. |
| 5 | **[The Longest Increasing Subsequence Problem revisited](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01501v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Longest Increasing Subsequence problem - a classic combinatorial challenge with deep connections to statistical mechanics- exhibits a rich thermodynamic landscape. Introducing a temperature we identify two distinct energy scales: A Schottky-like crossover at T_cross and a condensation transition at T_cond, below which the number of maximum-length configurations becomes sub-exponential in system size. We also show that despite the existence of polynomial-time dynamic programming algorithms for the ground state, local Monte Carlo dynamics, after sudden quenches at low temperatures, become trapped in metastable state configurations displaying characteristic glassy signatures: two-step relaxation, persistent dynamical overlaps and aging. On the other hand, logarithmic annealing tracks equilibrium down to the ground state. These results establish that thermodynamic sparsity - not energetic barriers - can render local search dynamically intractable, positioning the LIS problem as a bridge between exactly solvable optimization and glassy spin-glass phenomenology.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>最长递增子序列问题——一个与统计力学有深刻联系的经典组合挑战——展现出丰富的热力学景观。通过引入温度，我们识别出两个不同的能量尺度：T_cross处的肖特基型交叉和T_cond处的凝聚相变，在T_cond以下，最大长度构型的数量在系统尺寸上呈次指数增长。我们还表明，尽管存在用于基态的多项式时间动态规划算法，局部蒙特卡洛动力学在低温快速淬火后，会陷入具有典型玻璃态特征的亚稳态构型：两步弛豫、持续动力学重叠和老化。另一方面，对数退火可追踪平衡态直至基态。这些结果确立了热力学稀疏性——而非能量势垒——可以使局部搜索在动力学上难以处理，将LIS问题定位为精确可解优化与玻璃态自旋玻璃现象学之间的桥梁。</p></details> | 2026-05-31 | Silvio Franz et al. |
| 6 | **[Probabilistic Computers for MIMO Detection: From Sparsification to 2D Parallel Tempering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.09037v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Probabilistic computers built from p-bits offer a promising path for combinatorial optimization, but the dense connectivity required by real-world problems scales poorly in hardware. Here, we address this through graph sparsification with auxiliary copy variables and demonstrate two fully on-chip parallel tempering solvers on an FPGA. Targeting MIMO detection, a dense, NP-hard problem central to wireless communications, we first fit 11 temperature replicas of a 128-node sparsified system (1,408 p-bits) on-chip and achieve bit error rates significantly below conventional linear detectors on $64 \times 64$ BPSK MIMO. We report complete end-to-end solution times of 3~ms per instance, including all loading, sampling, readout, and verification overheads. ASIC projections in 7~nm technology indicate 103~MHz operation at 285.8~mW, suggesting that massive parallelism across multiple chips could approach the throughput demands of next-generation wireless systems. Sparsification, however, introduces a sharp sensitivity to the copy-constraint strength $P$ that requires manual tuning. To eliminate this bottleneck, we utilize Two-Dimensional Parallel Tempering (2D-PT), which exchanges replicas across both temperature ($β$) and constraint ($P$) dimensions. On Sherrington--Kirkpatrick spin glasses, 2D-PT converges roughly $250\times$ faster than optimally tuned 1D-PT, and on $128 \times 128$ MIMO it reaches zero bit errors at high SNR where 1D-PT exhibits an error floor. We further validate 2D-PT entirely on-chip with 54 replicas (1,728 p-bits) on a $16 \times 16$ MIMO instance, where it tracks the maximum-likelihood bound in just 50 Monte Carlo steps -- $10\times$ fewer than 1D-PT -- at projected 111~MHz and 124~mW in 7~nm. Together, these results establish an on-chip p-bit architecture and a scalable, tuning-free algorithmic framework for dense combinatorial optimization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>由p比特构建的概率计算机为组合优化提供了一条有前景的路径，但现实问题所需的密集连接性在硬件中扩展性较差。在此，我们通过带有辅助复制变量的图稀疏化来解决这一问题，并在FPGA上演示了两个完全片上并行回火求解器。针对MIMO检测（一个密集的、NP难的无线通信核心问题），我们首先将128节点稀疏化系统（1,408个p比特）的11个温度副本集成到芯片上，并在64 × 64 BPSK MIMO上实现了显著低于传统线性检测器的误码率。我们报告了每个实例的完整端到端求解时间为3毫秒，包括所有加载、采样、读出和验证开销。7纳米技术的ASIC预测表明，在285.8毫瓦功耗下可实现103兆赫兹运行，这表明跨多个芯片的大规模并行化可能接近下一代无线系统的吞吐量需求。然而，稀疏化引入了对复制约束强度P的尖锐敏感性，需要手动调谐。为消除这一瓶颈，我们利用二维并行回火（2D-PT），它在温度（β）和约束（P）两个维度上交换副本。在Sherrington-Kirkpatrick自旋玻璃上，2D-PT的收敛速度比最优调谐的1D-PT快约250倍；在128 × 128 MIMO上，它在高信噪比下达到零误码率，而1D-PT则表现出错误平层。我们进一步在16 × 16 MIMO实例上，用54个副本（1,728个p比特）完全在片上验证了2D-PT，它仅需50个蒙特卡洛步即可跟踪最大似然界——比1D-PT少10倍——在7纳米工艺下预计运行频率为111兆赫兹，功耗为124毫瓦。这些结果共同建立了一种片上p比特架构和一种可扩展、免调谐的密集组合优化算法框架。</p></details> | 2026-05-31 | M Mahmudul Hasan Sajeeb et al. |
| 7 | **[Anisotropic Kitaev Spin Glass in Li$_{2}$Ru$_{x}$Ir$_{1-x}$O$_{3}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.22280v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Kitaev iridates have emerged as an important class of spin-orbit-entangled quantum materials in which bond-directional exchange interactions generate strong magnetic frustration and unconventional correlated states. Rather than realizing simple ordered magnets, members of the alpha,beta,gamma-Li2IrO3 family exhibit fragile and highly anisotropic magnetic behavior, including incommensurate counter-rotating order, strong field sensitivity, and pressure-driven electronic reconstruction. These phenomena place the iridates in close proximity to the Kitaev quantum spin liquid (QSL) regime, while simultaneously revealing the importance of competing interactions, lattice distortions, and spin-orbit-assisted hopping processes beyond the ideal Kitaev limit. Understanding how chemical substitution perturbs these competing interactions provides a route toward probing the underlying frustrated magnetic state. Here, we study single crystals of beta-Li2RuxIr1-xO3 with dilute Ru substitution, x<~10%. Through a combination of magnetometry, resonant elastic X-ray scattering, ac-heat capacity, and muon spin relaxation/rotation, we show that weak magnetic disorder continuously suppresses the incommensurate antiferromagnetic ground state without stabilizing an alternative long-range ordered phase. Instead, the system evolves into a bulk static spin glass characterized by slow relaxation, aging behavior, and frozen local magnetic fields. Despite the loss of long-range magnetic order, the glassy state retains substantial directional anisotropy without significant distortion to the honeycomb lattice, suggesting that disorder freezes spins within a still-active bond-directional exchange environment. In this picture, dilute Ru substitution provides a controlled pathway into an anisotropic Kitaev spin glass regime that preserves essential fingerprints of the underlying Kitaev exchange network.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基塔耶夫铱氧化物已成为一类重要的自旋-轨道纠缠量子材料，其中键方向交换相互作用会产生强磁阻挫和非常规关联态。α、β、γ-Li2IrO3家族成员并非实现简单有序磁体，而是表现出脆弱且高度各向异性的磁性行为，包括非公度反向旋转序、强场敏感性以及压力驱动的电子重构。这些现象使铱氧化物接近基塔耶夫量子自旋液体区域，同时揭示了超越理想基塔耶夫极限的竞争相互作用、晶格畸变和自旋-轨道辅助跃迁过程的重要性。理解化学替代如何扰动这些竞争相互作用，为探索底层阻挫磁态提供了途径。本文研究了Ru稀释替代（x<~10%）的β-Li2RuxIr1-xO3单晶。通过磁学测量、共振弹性X射线散射、交流热容和μ子自旋弛豫/旋转等综合手段，我们证明弱磁无序持续抑制非公度反铁磁基态，但并未稳定其他长程有序相。相反，系统演变为体静态自旋玻璃态，其特征为慢弛豫、老化行为和冻结局域磁场。尽管长程磁序消失，玻璃态仍保持显著的方向各向异性，且蜂窝晶格无明显畸变，表明无序在仍活跃的键方向交换环境中冻结了自旋。在此图景中，稀释Ru替代提供了一条进入各向异性基塔耶夫自旋玻璃态的可控途径，该玻璃态保留了底层基塔耶夫交换网络的基本特征。</p></details> | 2026-05-30 | Mayia A. Vranas et al. |
| 8 | **[Estimates of ground state energies for the quantum SK and 2D-EA model, using deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29875v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform a large scale simulation of quantum annealing in the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) spin glass up to a system size $N=40000$ to estimate its ground state energy using the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field Ising dynamics, extending the earlier results (reported in Eur. Phys. J. B {\bf 98}, 226 (2025)). Here we numerically solve the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo annealing dynamics to obtain the spin configurations and subsequently the ground state energy for a given system size at the end of the annealing (to the desired quantum system at the corresponding values of the transverse field), starting from a quantum paramagnetic state. The method shows high efficiency, with an overall algorithmic cost of $O(N^3)$ in estimating the energy of the ground state. We later extend this method to study the ground state energy of the Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass on a square lattice.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用德热纳-铃木-久保平均场伊辛动力学，对谢林顿-柯克帕特里克自旋玻璃系统进行了大规模量子退火模拟，系统尺寸高达 \(N=40000\)，以估算其基态能量，该研究扩展了先前的结果（发表于《欧洲物理杂志B》第98卷，226页，2025年）。在此，我们通过数值求解德热纳-铃木-久保退火动力学，从量子顺磁态出发，获得退火结束时（对应于相应横向场值下的目标量子系统）给定系统尺寸的自旋构型，进而得到基态能量。该方法效率较高，估算基态能量的总体算法复杂度为 \(O(N^3)\)。随后，我们将该方法推广至研究正方晶格上爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃的基态能量。</p></details> | 2026-05-28 | Soumyaditya Das et al. |
